mapper.select:
SELECT member_id, is_admin, email, nickname, user_intro, reg_dt, mod_dt FROM member
AND (email LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%')
ORDER BY member_id DESC

SELECT m.member_id, m.is_admin, m.email, m.nickname, m.user_intro, m.reg_dt, m.mod_dt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artwork a WHERE a.member_id = m.member_id) AS artwork_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_like l WHERE l.member_id = m.member_id) AS like_cnt FROM member m WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_member.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO member ( member_id, password, is_admin, email, nickname, user_intro, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{password}, #{isAdmin}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{userIntro,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
